---
title: "Contact"
---

## Jane Doe

::: {style="overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 2rem;"}
![](img/jane.jpg){.jane-photo style="float: left; margin: 0 1rem 0.5rem 0; border-radius: 6px;" width="220px" fig-alt="Jane Doe, Principal of Pine Straw Distributors LLC"}

Jane Doe didn't set out to build a career in pine straw — but after 25 years, she wouldn't
have it any other way. A native of the Midwest, Jane graduated from Indiana University with
a degree in business and a lifelong love of the outdoors. After graduation she headed south,
first settling in Georgia, where she discovered the pine straw industry almost by accident
while managing a landscaping account for a golf course outside Atlanta.

That first encounter changed everything. Jane recognized immediately that pine straw was not
just a mulch — it was the finishing touch that separated an average landscape from a
genuinely beautiful one. She spent the next decade learning every corner of the Georgia
market, building supplier relationships, and developing the logistics knowledge that would
define her career.

Eventually the business — and the weather — drew her further south to Florida, where she
established Pine Straw Distributors LLC and expanded her network across the full breadth of
the southeastern United States. Today she sources premium pine straw from the longleaf and
slash pine forests she has come to know intimately over a quarter century in the field.

Away from work, Jane is most likely to be found on a golf course — preferably one with
immaculate pine straw beds lining the fairways. She believes that great landscaping and a
great round of golf share the same quality: everything in its right place.
:::

---

## Get in Touch

**Jane Doe**
Principal, Pine Straw Distributors LLC

- **Phone:** xxx-xxx-xxxx
- **Email:** jane@pinestrawdistributors.com
- **Service Area:** Northern Florida & Southern Georgia

## Our Location

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<div id="map" style="height: 400px; border-radius: 6px; margin: 1rem 0;"></div>
<script>
  var map = L.map('map', {scrollWheelZoom: false, dragging: false, zoomControl: false}).setView([27.0998, -82.4543], 13);
  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', {
    attribution: '&copy; <a href="https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright">OpenStreetMap</a> contributors'
  }).addTo(map);
  L.marker([27.0998, -82.4543])
    .addTo(map)
    .bindPopup('<strong>Pine Straw Distributors LLC</strong><br>Venice, Florida')
    .openPopup();
</script>
```
